import React from 'react'; import '../HeaderNavigator.css'; class HeaderNavigator extends React.Component { constructor(props) { super(props); this.state = { headerNavigatorClass: props.headerNavigatorClass || "header-navigator", headerNavigatorItemClass: props.headerNavigatorItemClass || "header-navigator-item", headerNavigatorLinkClass: props.headerNavigatorLinkClass || "header-navigator-link" }; } render() { return (
    Home

    Operating Systems

    Tools

); } }; export default HeaderNavigator;
